layering_strategy.description: Internal layering pattern per bounded context (hexagonal/clean/layered), CQRS decisions, and derivation rationale

aggregate_consistency.description: Consistency model per aggregate: within-aggregate (always strong) and cross-aggregate events with targets

integration_patterns.description: Cross-context integration decisions: relationship type, sync/async, API surface, ACL, consistency guarantee

storage.description: Storage type per aggregate (relational/document/event-store/in-memory) with transaction boundary and rationale

cross_cutting.description: Auth, error propagation, and observability decisions applied globally

testing_strategy.description: Testing approach per architectural layer with what to test and what not to test

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements with measurable constraints, scope, and source

open_questions.description: Unresolved architectural ambiguities blocking the tech stack stage
